name: bars-google-apps-scripts
description: Shared dependencies for all Google Apps Script projects

scripts.clean: bash -c 'if [ -z "$1" ]; then echo "❌ Usage: pnpm clean <project-name>"; exit 1; fi; PROJECT="$1"; if [ ! -d "projects/$PROJECT" ]; then echo "❌ Project not found: $PROJECT"; exit 1; fi; bash ../scripts/deployment/google/clean.sh "projects/$PROJECT"' --
scripts.test: echo 'Run specific project tests with: pnpm test:create-products or pnpm test:process-refunds'
